summary: Substitute FRESHSERVICE_DOMAIN into BaseURL and switch HTTP Basic to `apikey:` (empty password). Added normalizeFreshserviceDomain helper to accept the lenient pasted forms users actually have (bare slug, https://, /api/v2/, etc.).
reason: Generator defaulted BaseURL to the placeholder `https://yourcompany.freshservice.com/api/v2` with no env-var substitution, so every API call DNS-failed. The generated AuthHeader() also assembled Basic credentials as `apikey:domain`; Freshservice's Basic scheme is `apikey:` (empty password) and rejects the alternative form. Discovered live, fixed in printed CLI, then filed against the generator.
validated_outcome: Live read smoke (tickets get/list, agents list, assets list, sync) succeeded against the real tenant after this fix; previously every request returned a transport-level DNS error or HTTP 401.
